# 2. Azimuth (Urbit ID)

Azimuth is Urbit's public-key infrastructure on Ethereum. Every ship has a cryptographic identity called a **point**, displayed with the `@p` aura.

## The Address Space

| Rank | Size | Example |
|------|------|---------|
| Galaxy | 256 | `~zod`, `~fes` |
| Star | ~65K | `~marzod` |
| Planet | ~4B | `~sampel-palnet` |
| Moon | 2^64 | `~doznec-sampel` |

The `@p` mnemonic names come from 256 prefix + 256 suffix syllables.

## Address Arithmetic

Since `@p` values are unsigned integers, you can do arithmetic on them. Galaxies are 0-255, stars 256-65535, planets 65536 and above.

## Sponsors

Every planet is sponsored by a star; every star by a galaxy. Subtract 2^16 (65,536) from a planet to find its sponsoring star.

> `(sein:title our now point)` works in dojo where `our` and `now` are in scope.
